tools.name: createInvoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice with line items for a client

tools.name: listInvoices
tools.description: List invoices with optional status and date filters

tools.name: getInvoice
tools.description: Get a single invoice with full line item details

tools.name: updateInvoiceStatus
tools.description: Update the status of an invoice (DRAFT, SENT, PAID, OVERDUE, CANCELLED)

tools.name: trackPayment
tools.description: Record a payment against an invoice

tools.name: getFinancialSummary
tools.description: Get financial overview with total revenue, outstanding amounts, and top clients

tools.name: setBudget
tools.description: Create or update a budget record for an organization or department

tools.name: listBudgets
tools.description: List budgets with optional category and period filters

tools.name: trackBudgetSpend
tools.description: Record spend against a budget and get updated utilization

tools.name: getBudgetSummary
tools.description: Get budget utilization overview across all categories

tools.name: forecastRevenue
tools.description: Generate a revenue forecast for upcoming months based on retainers and pipeline

tools.name: getRevenueMetrics
tools.description: Get actual revenue metrics including MRR, ARR, churn rate, and deal size

tools.name: listForecastScenarios
tools.description: Get conservative, base, and optimistic revenue forecast scenarios
